data.title: 国际服总力战实装Insane难度 & 总力战更新紫币
data.summary: [Total Assault Update Preview] A new ‘Insane’ difficulty will be added to the Total Assault - Shiro
data.body:
[Total Assault Update Preview]

A new ‘Insane’ difficulty will be added to the Total Assault - Shiro & Kuro, revealed on 9/27.

A new Advanced Total Assault Coin and Total Assault Shop will be added as well as improvements to the Rank Points Rewards .

#BlueArchive![2B3bNbi6Sr4Sej3YNkb3KfiExyQ5PAD1.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/2B3bNbi6Sr4Sej3YNkb3KfiExyQ5PAD1.jpg)
